title: Ecto.Enum plus changeset preserves atomicity
prompt: Rewrite test_fixtures/stringly_typed_status.ex to use Ecto.Enum for both :status and :priority. Keep the same allowed values. Also add a validate_required for :status (default Task gets :pending implicitly via default but require explicit presence). Write to lib/my_app/tasks/task.ex.
tier_rationale: Full-field-swap from stringly-typed to Ecto.Enum with the validate_inclusion calls removed.
